scores.correctness_notes: Covers the main patterns accurately: event.relation.data[event.unit], iterating over relation.units, writing to own databags, and accessing outside relation events. Matches gold standard well.
scores.hallucination_notes: Does not mention Relation.load() with dataclasses/Pydantic (omission, not hallucination). The filtering pattern 'if unit.app is not self.app' from gold standard is missing when iterating units, but nothing fabricated. Minor: gold standard doesn't mention model.get_relation() as a pattern but it is a valid ops API, not hallucinated.
